title: Sweet Martini
ingredients:
75 ml Hayman's London Dry Gin
- 15 ml Strucchi Rosso Vermouth
method:
STIR all ingredients with ice.
FINE STRAIN into chilled glass.

title: Vermouth & Soda
glass: Photographed in an Urban Bar Fluet Old Fashioned 34cl
ingredients:
60 ml Strucchi Rosso Vermouth chilled
- 60 ml Thomas Henry Soda Water chilled
method:
Select and pre-chill an OLD-FASHIONED GLASS.
Prepare garnish of half orange slice wheel skewered with green olive.
POUR all ingredients into ice-filled glass.
Garnish with orange slice skewered with olive.

title: Sweet Manhattan (batched recipe)
ingredients:
300 ml Bourbon whiskey
- 300 ml Straight rye whiskey (100 proof /50% alc./vol.)
- 300 ml Strucchi Rosso Vermouth
- 25 ml Luxardo Maraschino liqueur
- 25 ml Heering Cherry Liqueur
- 10 ml Angostura Aromatic Bitters
- 5 ml Peychaud's or other Creole-style bitters
method:
COMBINE all ingredients and stir (without ice).
POUR into a litre bottle and leave to chill in a refrigerator.
To serve, STIR 2 shots / 2oz / 60ml of the bottled mixture with ice and strain into chilled glass.

title: Sweet Virginia
glass: Photographed in an Urban Bar Alto Coupe 18cl
ingredients:
45 ml Bourbon whiskey
- 20 ml Heering Cherry Liqueur
- 15 ml Ferrand Dry Curaçao
- 15 ml Strucchi Rosso Vermouth
- 15 ml Pineapple juice
- 1 dash Boker's style bitters
- 1 dash Peychaud's or other Creole-style bitters
method:
SHAKE all ingredients with ice.
FINE STRAIN into chilled glass.

title: Manhattan (Sweet)
glass: Photographed in an UB Retro Coupe Gold 7.75oz
ingredients:
45 ml Bourbon whiskey
- 15 ml Straight rye whiskey (100 proof /50% alc./vol.)
- 30 ml Strucchi Rosso Vermouth
- 1 dash Angostura Aromatic Bitters
method:
STIR all ingredients with ice.
FINE STRAIN into chilled glass.

title: High Ryeser
glass: Photographed in an UB Retro Coupe 1910
ingredients:
45 ml Straight rye whiskey (100 proof /50% alc./vol.)
- 45 ml Strucchi Rosso Vermouth
- 1 dash Angostura Aromatic Bitters
method:
STIR all ingredients with ice.
FINE STRAIN into chilled glass.

title: Manhattan (Sweet with Bitter Chocolate)
ingredients:
60 ml Bourbon whiskey
- 22.5 ml Strucchi Rosso Vermouth
- 5 ml De Kuyper Brown Crème de Cacao
- 5 ml Luxardo Maraschino liqueur
- 6 drop Bob's Chocolate bitters
method:
STIR all ingredients with ice.
FINE STRAIN into chilled glass.

title: Negroni Cocktail
glass: Photographed in an Urban Bar Fluet Old Fashioned 34cl
ingredients:
30 ml Hayman's London Dry Gin
- 30 ml Strucchi Red Bitter (Campari-style liqueur)
- 30 ml Strucchi Rosso Vermouth
method:
POUR all ingredients into ice-filled glass.
STIR.

title: Fridge Negroni
ingredients:
30 ml Hayman's London Dry Gin
- 30 ml Strucchi Red Bitter (Campari-style liqueur)
- 30 ml Strucchi Rosso Vermouth
- 10 ml Chilled water
method:
Use the serve number selector (below the ingredients) to set the number of serves you want in your pre-batch. (x7 serves is recommended as this will fill a standard bottle – see below for x7 volumes and weights).
POUR all ingredients into a clean, resealable 70cl or 75cl bottle.
Seal the bottle and turn/shake to ensure the integration of ingredients.
Place in a refrigerator to chill for at least 4 hours prior to serving.
For each Individual serve: POUR 100ml into an ice-filled old-fashioned glass.

title: Million Dollar Cocktail
ingredients:
45 ml Hayman's London Dry Gin
- 22.5 ml Strucchi Rosso Vermouth chilled
- 15 ml Pineapple juice
- 7.5 ml Grenadine/pomegranate syrup
- 15 ml Egg white (pasteurised) or Vegg White vegan egg white alternative
- 2 drop Saline solution (20g sea salt to 80g water) or merest pinch of s
method:
SHAKE all ingredients with ice and strain back into shaker.
DRY SHAKE (without ice).
FINE STRAIN into chilled glass.

title: Man O' War
ingredients:
45 ml Bourbon whiskey
- 15 ml De Kuyper Triple Sec (40%)
- 15 ml Strucchi Rosso Vermouth
- 15 ml Lemon juice (freshly squeezed)
- 2.5 ml Sugar syrup 'rich' (2 sugar to 1 water, 65.0°Brix) optional
- 3 drop Saline solution (20g sea salt to 80g water) or merest pinch of s optional
method:
SHAKE all ingredients with ice.
FINE STRAIN into chilled glass.

title: J & Tony's Hot Negroni
ingredients:
15 ml Hayman's London Dry Gin
- 15 ml Strucchi Red Bitter (Campari-style liqueur)
- 15 ml Strucchi Rosso Vermouth
- 5 ml Lemon juice (freshly squeezed)
- 5 ml Sugar syrup 'rich' (2 sugar to 1 water, 65.0°Brix)
- 80 ml Boiling water
method:
Select and pre-heat a TODDY GLASS.
Prepare garnish of orange zest twist.
POUR all ingredients into pre-warmed heat-proof glass.
EXPRESS orange zest twist over the cocktail and use as garnish.

title: Old Flame
ingredients:
30 ml Hayman's London Dry Gin
- 15 ml De Kuyper Triple Sec (40%)
- 15 ml Strucchi Rosso Vermouth
- 15 ml Strucchi Red Bitter (Campari-style liqueur)

method:
SHAKE all ingredients with ice.

title: Marianito

- 3 dash Angostura Aromatic Bitters
- 2 drop Saline solution (20g sea salt to 80g water) or merest pinch of s
method:
STIR all ingredients with ice.
STRAIN into ice-filled glass.

title: Adonis

- 2.5 ml Strucchi Red Bitter (Campari-style liqueur)

STIR all ingredients with ice.
STRAIN into ice-filled glass (preferably over a large cube or chunk of block ice).

method: RINSE chilled glass with absinthe and set to one side. STIR other ingredients with ice and strain into absinthe rinsed glass.

method:
SHAKE all ingredients with ice.

Add other ingredients.
SHAKE with ice.
FINE STRAIN into chilled glass.

method:

EXPRESS lemon zest twist over the cocktail and use as garnish.

method:

title: Capitano

method:

title: Precursory Cocktail

method:
SHAKE all ingredients with ice.

title: New Orleans Minute

method:

title: Negroni Flip
glass: Photographed in an UB Retro Coupe Gold 7.75oz
ingredients:
30 ml Hayman's London Dry Gin
- 30 ml Strucchi Red Bitter (Campari-style liqueur)
- 30 ml Carpano Antica Formula Vermouth
- 2.5 ml Sugar syrup 'rich' (2 sugar to 1 water, 65.0°Brix)
- 2 drop Saline solution (20g sea salt to 80g water) or merest pinch of s
- 1 whole Egg (white & yolk)
method:
DRY SHAKE all ingredients (without ice) to emulsify.
SHAKE again with ice.
FINE STRAIN into chilled glass.

title: Game Set Match
ingredients:
50 ml Bourbon whiskey
- 15 ml Carpano Antica Formula Vermouth

method:
STIR all ingredients with ice.
FINE STRAIN into chilled glass.

title: Del Famoso (The Famous)

method:
STIR all ingredients with ice.
FINE STRAIN into chilled glass.

title: Bitter Giuseppe
glass: Photographed in an UB Koto Old Fashioned 30cl
ingredients:
1 swath Lemon peel
- 60 ml Cynar or other carciofo amaro
- 30 ml Carpano Antica Formula Vermouth
- 7.5 ml Lemon juice (freshly squeezed)
- 3 dash Orange Bitters by Angostura
method:
SQUEEZE the oils from a lemon zest into stirring glass and drop zest in.
Add other ingredients and REGAL STIR with ice.
STRAIN into ice-filled glass (preferably over a large cube or chunk of block ice).

title: Rhubarb Lucca Negroni

title: Negroni and the Goat

- 15 ml Amaro (e.g. Averna)
method:

title: Munich Negroni Western Style

title: Left Hand

method:

title: Stiletta
ingredients:
1 dried Star anise
- 30 ml Strucchi Red Bitter (Campari-style liqueur)
- 45 ml Patrón Silver blanco tequila
- 30 ml Carpano Antica Formula Vermouth
method: MUDDLE (smash) a star anise in base of stirring glass. Add other ingredients, STIR with ice and extra fine strain into chilled glass. OR Omit the muddled star anise and instead pre-prepare Star anise-infused Italian red bitter liqueur by infusing 18-20 star anise pods into a 70-75cl bottle. Seal and shake periodically over 8 hours, then strain through a dampened coffee filter or cheesecloth.

title: Lucky Luke

.

method:

title: L' Italo Americano
ingredients:
45 ml Italicus liqueur
- 45 ml Savoia Americano Rosso
- 45 ml Thomas Henry Pink Grapefruit soda
- 6 drop Bob's Grapefruit Bitters
method: POUR all ingredients into chilled glass and the add ice to fill.

title: Pink Americano
ingredients:
30 ml Strucchi Rosso Vermouth
- 30 ml Strucchi Red Bitter (Campari-style liqueur)
- Top up with Thomas Henry Pink Grapefruit soda
method:
POUR all ingredients into ice-filled glass.
Lightly stir.

title: Fig Leaf Americano
ingredients:
30 ml Strucchi Rosso Vermouth
- 25 ml Strucchi Red Bitter (Campari-style liqueur)
- 120 ml Fig Leaf Soda chilled
method:
POUR all ingredients into chilled glass.
FILL glass with ice.

title: Champino
ingredients:
30 ml Strucchi Red Bitter (Campari-style liqueur)
- 30 ml Strucchi Rosso Vermouth
- 60 ml Brut champagne/sparkling wine
method:
SHAKE first 2 ingredients with ice.
FINE STRAIN into chilled glass.
TOP with sparkling wine.

title: Winter Americano
glass: Photographed in an Urban Bar Fluet Highball 45cl
ingredients:
40 ml Strucchi Red Bitter (Campari-style liqueur)
- 40 ml Strucchi Rosso Vermouth
- 90 ml Mandarin soda
method:
Select and pre-chill a COLLINS GLASS.
Prepare garnish of lemon and orange zest twist.
POUR all ingredients into glass.
FILL glass with ice.

title: Americano Perfecto
glass: Photographed in a Modern America Collins
ingredients:
45 ml Strucchi Red Bitter (Campari-style liqueur)
- 22.5 ml Strucchi Rosso Vermouth
- 22.5 ml Carpano Antica Formula Vermouth
- 120 ml Pilsner lager
method:
STIR first 3 ingredients with ice.
STRAIN into ice-filled glass.
TOP with beer and briefly stir

title: Summer Americano
ingredients:
30 ml Rubino/Rosso/Rojo (sweet, fruity) vermouth
- 30 ml Strucchi Red Bitter (Campari-style liqueur)
- 5 ml Gentian liqueur (e.g. Suze, Salers etc)
- 3 drop Bob's Cardamom bitters
- 30 ml Thomas Henry Tonic Water
method:
STIR first 4 ingredients with ice.
STRAIN into ice-filled glass whilst also pouring tonic water.

title: A Lucky Roman Americano
ingredients:
30 ml Strucchi Red Bitter (Campari-style liqueur)
- 30 ml Strucchi Rosso Vermouth
- 30 ml Cynar or other carciofo amaro
- 2 dash Bob's Peppermint Bitters
- Top up with *Special ingredient #1 (see above)
method: THROW first 4 ingredients with ice and strain into ice-filled glass. Top with rosemary soda. Special ingredient #1: Rosemary soda

title: L'Americano Moderno
ingredients:
60 ml Savoia Americano Rosso
- 4 dash Orange Bitters by Angostura
- 40 ml Elderberry & hibiscus soda
method:
Select and pre-chill an OLD-FASHIONED GLASS.
Prepare garnish of edible flower or orange slice.
POUR all ingredients into ice-filled glass.
Briefly STIR.

title: D&B Shakerato
ingredients:
50 ml Savoia Americano Rosso
- 20 ml Pink grapefruit juice (freshly squeezed)
- 10 ml Honey syrup (3 parts honey to 1 water by weight)
- 2 drop Saline solution (20g sea salt to 80g water) or merest pinch of s
method:
SHAKE all ingredients with ice.
FINE STRAIN into chilled glass.

title: Less is More Negroni
ingredients:
50 ml Savoia Americano Rosso
- 25 ml Hayman's London Dry Gin
method:
POUR all ingredients into ice-filled glass.
Briefly STIR.

title: Casa Savoia Garibaldi
ingredients:
50 ml Savoia Americano Rosso
- 90 ml Orange juice (freshly squeezed)
method:
Squeeze orange juice using pillar or elbow press and fine strain to remove any flesh.
DRY BLEND the freshly squeezed juice at high speed (without ice) to make "fluffy".
POUR rosso americano/quinquina and half of the orange juice into glass over 2 cubes of ice and STIR.
Fill glass with more ice (3 cubes) and fill with rest of fluffy orange juice.

title: Casa Savoia Boulevardier
ingredients:
50 ml Savoia Americano Rosso
- 25 ml Bourbon whiskey
method: POUR all ingredients into ice-filled glass (preferably over a large cube or junk of block ice).

title: Difford's Fruit Cup No.1 (gin based & Pimm's Cup-like)
ingredients:
25 ml Hayman's London Dry Gin
- 25 ml Ferrand Dry Curaçao
- 25 ml Strucchi Rosso Vermouth
- 2 dash Angostura Aromatic Bitters
- 50 ml Thomas Henry Ginger Ale
- 50 ml Cola (e.g. Coca-Cola or Pepsi)
method:
POUR all ingredients into glass.
Half fill glass with ice.
Add a citrus slice and a couple of mint leaves from garnish
Fill to brim with ice.

title: Meditation
ingredients:
60 ml Lustau Amontillado Los Arcos Sherry
- 22.5 ml Strucchi Rosso Vermouth
- 5 ml Green Chartreuse (or alternative herbal liqueur)
- 5 ml Fernet Branca liqueur
- 5 ml Grenadine/pomegranate syrup
method:
STIR all ingredients with ice.
FINE STRAIN into chilled glass.

title: Bobby Burns (Difford's own)
glass: Serve in a Nick & Nora glass
ingredients:
37.5 ml Blended Scotch whisky
- 30 ml Strucchi Rosso Vermouth
- 10 ml Bénédictine D.O.M. liqueur
- 2 dash Peychaud's or other Creole-style bitters
- 1 dash La Fée Parisienne absinthe
method:
STIR all ingredients with ice.
FINE STRAIN into chilled glass.

title: The Addington
ingredients:
45 ml Cognac (brandy)
- 22.5 ml Strucchi Rosso Vermouth
- 10 ml Bénédictine D.O.M. liqueur
- 1 dash Boker's style bitters
method:
STIR all ingredients with ice.
FINE STRAIN into chilled glass.

title: Tequila Fruit Cup (Difford's Cup No.7)
ingredients:
25 ml Patrón Reposado tequila
- 25 ml Ferrand Dry Curaçao
- 25 ml Strucchi Rosso Vermouth
- 2 dash Bob's Lavender Bitters
- 50 ml Thomas Henry Ginger Ale
- 50 ml Cola (e.g. Coca-Cola or Pepsi)
method:
POUR all ingredients into glass.
Half fill glass with ice.
Add a citrus slice and a couple of mint leaves from garnish
Fill to brim with ice.

title: La Familia
ingredients:
45 ml Light white rum (charcoal-filtered 1-4 years old)
- 30 ml Lustau Amontillado Los Arcos Sherry
- 30 ml Orange juice (freshly squeezed)
- 2 barspoon Strucchi Rosso Vermouth
method:
SHAKE all ingredients with ice.
FINE STRAIN into chilled glass.
